title: Workflow Run Status
excerpt: I am using the new Workflow feature. There is an option to “Stop” a workflow once it has started, but even after it is stopped, it continues to show as “Waiting”. Please create a “Stopped” category so we can more easily …

posts.author: mdalzell (Meredith Dalzell)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using the new Workflow feature. There is an option to “Stop” a workflow once it has started, but even after it is stopped, it continues to show as “Waiting”. Please create a “Stopped” category so we can more easily tell if a workflow is really waiting.
